title: ModalAssetComponent
description: Trigger a Modal function as a Dagster asset. Supports both the Modal Python SDK and a 'modal run' CLI fallback. Suitable for GPU workloads, ML training, batch inference, and any serverless compute job you want to track inside a Dagster pipeline.

asset_name.description: Dagster asset key for this component.

modal_function.description: Fully-qualified Modal function reference in 'app_name::function_name' form. Used as a display label and for SDK lookups.

app_file.description: Path to the Python file defining the Modal app. Required for the CLI fallback path.

function_name.description: Name of the @modal.function within app_file. Required for the CLI fallback.

args.description: Positional arguments forwarded to the Modal function.

kwargs.description: Keyword arguments forwarded to the Modal function.

modal_token_id_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the Modal token ID.

modal_token_secret_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable containing the Modal token secret.

detach.description: When true, dispatch the function and return immediately without waiting for completion (fire-and-forget).

description.description: Human-readable description surfaced in the Dagster UI.

deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on.
